mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO realtime_candidate_score_result_v3 ( trade_date, stock_code, short_name, market, sector, price_1400, price_1430, return_to_1430, tail_momentum, tail_amount_1400_1430, tail_amount_ratio, intraday_position, relative_strength_1430, amount_before_1430, return_5d, return_20d, volatility_20d, avg_amount_20d, avg_amplitude_20d, max_drop_20d, position_20d, morning_high_return_avg, morning_high_return_median, hit_1pct_rate, hit_2pct_rate, hit_3pct_rate, force_sell_rate, force_sell_avg_return_bps, buy_fill_rate, buy_3pct_fill_rate, buy_2pct_fill_rate, buy_1pct_fill_rate, buy_3pct_avg_net_return_bps, buy_2pct_avg_net_return_bps, buy_1pct_avg_net_return_bps, not_filled_rate, post_buy_drawdown_avg, force_sell_loss_rate, max_loss_bps, liquidity_risk_score, gap_down_risk_score, short_sample_count, short_win_rate, short_adjusted_win_rate, short_avg_net_return_bps, short_avg_win_bps, short_avg_loss_bps, short_profit_loss_ratio, expected_net_return_score, morning_breakout_score, buy_execution_fit_score, tail_strength_score, sector_market_score, risk_control_score, short_sample_score, market_breadth, market_return_1430, market_regime, sector_strength, sector_breadth, sector_rank, final_score, rank_no, confidence_level, data_quality_flag, valid_flag, invalid_reason, strategy_version, score_explanation, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.stockCode}, #{item.shortName}, #{item.market}, #{item.sector}, #{item.price1400}, #{item.price1430}, #{item.returnTo1430}, #{item.tailMomentum}, #{item.tailAmount14001430}, #{item.tailAmountRatio}, #{item.intradayPosition}, #{item.relativeStrength1430}, #{item.amountBefore1430}, #{item.return5d}, #{item.return20d}, #{item.volatility20d}, #{item.avgAmount20d}, #{item.avgAmplitude20d}, #{item.maxDrop20d}, #{item.position20d}, #{item.morningHighReturnAvg}, #{item.morningHighReturnMedian}, #{item.hit1PctRate}, #{item.hit2PctRate}, #{item.hit3PctRate}, #{item.forceSellRate}, #{item.forceSellAvgReturnBps}, #{item.buyFillRate}, #{item.buy3PctFillRate}, #{item.buy2PctFillRate}, #{item.buy1PctFillRate}, #{item.buy3PctAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.buy2PctAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.buy1PctAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.notFilledRate}, #{item.postBuyDrawdownAvg}, #{item.forceSellLossRate}, #{item.maxLossBps}, #{item.liquidityRiskScore}, #{item.gapDownRiskScore}, #{item.shortSampleCount}, #{item.shortWinRate}, #{item.shortAdjustedWinRate}, #{item.shortAvgNetReturnBps}, #{item.shortAvgWinBps}, #{item.shortAvgLossBps}, #{item.shortProfitLossRatio}, #{item.expectedNetReturnScore}, #{item.morningBreakoutScore}, #{item.buyExecutionFitScore}, #{item.tailStrengthScore}, #{item.sectorMarketScore}, #{item.riskControlScore}, #{item.shortSampleScore}, #{item.marketBreadth}, #{item.marketReturn1430}, #{item.marketRegime}, #{item.sectorStrength}, #{item.sectorBreadth}, #{item.sectorRank}, #{item.finalScore}, #{item.rankNo}, #{item.confidenceLevel}, #{item.dataQualityFlag}, #{item.validFlag}, #{item.invalidReason}, #{item.strategyVersion}, #{item.scoreExplanation}, #{item.createdAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE short_name = VALUES(short_name), market = VALUES(market), sector = VALUES(sector), price_1400 = VALUES(price_1400), price_1430 = VALUES(price_1430), return_to_1430 = VALUES(return_to_1430), tail_momentum = VALUES(tail_momentum), tail_amount_1400_1430 = VALUES(tail_amount_1400_1430), tail_amount_ratio = VALUES(tail_amount_ratio), intraday_position = VALUES(intraday_position), relative_strength_1430 = VALUES(relative_strength_1430), amount_before_1430 = VALUES(amount_before_1430), return_5d = VALUES(return_5d), return_20d = VALUES(return_20d), volatility_20d = VALUES(volatility_20d), avg_amount_20d = VALUES(avg_amount_20d), avg_amplitude_20d = VALUES(avg_amplitude_20d), max_drop_20d = VALUES(max_drop_20d), position_20d = VALUES(position_20d), morning_high_return_avg = VALUES(morning_high_return_avg), morning_high_return_median = VALUES(morning_high_return_median), hit_1pct_rate = VALUES(hit_1pct_rate), hit_2pct_rate = VALUES(hit_2pct_rate), hit_3pct_rate = VALUES(hit_3pct_rate), force_sell_rate = VALUES(force_sell_rate), force_sell_avg_return_bps = VALUES(force_sell_avg_return_bps), buy_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_fill_rate), buy_3pct_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_3pct_fill_rate), buy_2pct_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_2pct_fill_rate), buy_1pct_fill_rate = VALUES(buy_1pct_fill_rate), buy_3pct_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(buy_3pct_avg_net_return_bps), buy_2pct_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(buy_2pct_avg_net_return_bps), buy_1pct_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(buy_1pct_avg_net_return_bps), not_filled_rate = VALUES(not_filled_rate), post_buy_drawdown_avg = VALUES(post_buy_drawdown_avg), force_sell_loss_rate = VALUES(force_sell_loss_rate), max_loss_bps = VALUES(max_loss_bps), liquidity_risk_score = VALUES(liquidity_risk_score), gap_down_risk_score = VALUES(gap_down_risk_score), short_sample_count = VALUES(short_sample_count), short_win_rate = VALUES(short_win_rate), short_adjusted_win_rate = VALUES(short_adjusted_win_rate), short_avg_net_return_bps = VALUES(short_avg_net_return_bps), short_avg_win_bps = VALUES(short_avg_win_bps), short_avg_loss_bps = VALUES(short_avg_loss_bps), short_profit_loss_ratio = VALUES(short_profit_loss_ratio), expected_net_return_score = VALUES(expected_net_return_score), morning_breakout_score = VALUES(morning_breakout_score), buy_execution_fit_score = VALUES(buy_execution_fit_score), tail_strength_score = VALUES(tail_strength_score), sector_market_score = VALUES(sector_market_score), risk_control_score = VALUES(risk_control_score), short_sample_score = VALUES(short_sample_score), market_breadth = VALUES(market_breadth), market_return_1430 = VALUES(market_return_1430), market_regime = VALUES(market_regime), sector_strength = VALUES(sector_strength), sector_breadth = VALUES(sector_breadth), sector_rank = VALUES(sector_rank), final_score = VALUES(final_score), rank_no = VALUES(rank_no), confidence_level = VALUES(confidence_level), data_quality_flag = VALUES(data_quality_flag), valid_flag = VALUES(valid_flag), invalid_reason = VALUES(invalid_reason), score_explanation = VALUES(score_explanation), created_at = VALUES(created_at)
